arts.ttl: Gary Lineker uses Real Madrid to put Celtic's Champions League success 'into perspective' before Aston Villa tie
arts.sum: Clearly impressed with Celtic’s Champions League exploits and after the Bhoys secured their playoff place, Lineker namechecked some of Europe’s super clubs to prove just how big the Hoops’ achievement is. Gary Lineker looks ahead to ‘rocking’ Aston Villa vs Celtic Champions League tie

arts.ttl: Club moving for Celtic man not considered ‘illogical’ – Bhoys want ‘bag of money’
arts.sum: A permanent move from Celtic to FC Twente is not considered ‘illogical’ for defender Gustaf Lagerbielke but any move is a question of his price tag. That’s according to Twente Insite, who cover the situation around the defender today and how a permanent transfer could happen. arts.ttl: Jota's transfer to Celtic is 'mental' as Premiership rival boils it down to £18million 'loan' coup
arts.sum: Andy Halliday can't quite believe Jota is back in Glasgow for a snip of the fee they got for him just a year and a half ago

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist reacts to 'big blow' for Brendan Rodgers and Celtic hours before Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: How Celtic approach the match was discussed by McCoist and Alan Brazil, as well as the absence of Cameron Carter-Vickers . Alan Brazil and Ally McCoist excited by Celtic’s Champions League clash at Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Aston Villa set Duran asking price amid Saudi interest
arts.sum: Aston Villa will consider the sale of Jhon Duran this month if a club meets their £80m valuation. Duran has had a breakthrough season at Aston Villa and has scored 12 goals in all competitions despite limited football. He has averaged a goal every 87 minutes to attract interest from rival clubs. A first European […] The post Aston Villa set Duran asking price amid Saudi interest first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers shares how close Celtic really were to signing Aston Villa hero John McGinn
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of tonight’s big Champions League game tie at Villa Park, Brendan Rodgers talked up McGinn and revealed how close Celtic were to signing him back then. Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers tried to sign McGinn back in 2018 in his first spell at Celtic but the Scotland international chose to move to Aston Villa who, at that time, were in the English Championship.

arts.ttl: Celtic XI vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Celtic head south of the border to take on Aston Villa in the Champions League tonight. The two teams are both assured a playoff place at the very least heading into matchday eight. arts.ttl: Report: Jhon Duran has just informed Aston Villa which club he wants to join in the coming days
arts.sum: Arsenal, Chelsea, West Ham all want to sign him👀

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Celtic – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa host Celtic in their final fixture of the Champions League’s league phase tonight. Both teams are guaranteed a place in the playoffs but have a chance of automatic progress to the Round of 16 with a win. arts.ttl: Emery has Chelsea DREAM as star says YES to Aston Villa move
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Chelsea have been locked in transfer talks in recent days, with at least one deal set to be done between the clubs as Unai Emery attempts to close in on his dream target. Football transfer news reporter Fabrizio Romano has revealed that Emery’s “dream” transfer target is out-of-favour Chelsea star Joao Felix, and the Italian says that should the opportunity arise, the Spaniard will certainly try to sign his compatriot before the transfer deadline on 3 February.
